recommendations.title: Trick or Treat
recommendations.overview: When the nephews come to Donald's house in their Halloween costumes he dumps water on them and laughs at his trick. A witch sees this and decides to help the kids. By magic she gives Donald a bad time and the kids finally get their treats.

recommendations.title: Mickey's House of Villains
recommendations.overview: The villains from the popular animated Disney films are gathered at the House of Mouse with plans to take over. Soon, the villains take over the house and kick out Mickey, Donald and Goofy. It's all up to Mickey and his friends to overthrow evil and
recommendations.director: Bobs Gannaway, Jamie Mitchell, Jack Hannah, Mike Moon, Tony Craig, Burt Gillett, Rick Schneider, Jack King

recommendations.title: Mickey's Magical Christmas: Snowed in at the House of Mouse
recommendations.overview: When a huge snowstorm leaves everyone stranded, Mickey and all of his guests at the House of Mouse, including Pooh, Belle, Snow White, Cinderella, Ariel and many more of his old and new friends, break out the cookies and hot chocolate to help Donald
recommendations.director: Tony Craig, Burny Mattinson, Bobs Gannaway, Jack Hannah

recommendations.title: Mickey's Trailer
recommendations.overview: Goofy's in the driver's seat, Mickey's in the kitchen, and Donald's in bed in Mickey's high-tech house trailer. When Goofy comes back to eat breakfast, leaving the car on autopilot, it takes them onto a dangerous closed mountain road. When Goofy real

recommendations.title: Mickey's Once Upon a Christmas
recommendations.overview: Mickey, Minnie, and their famous friends Goofy, Donald, Daisy and Pluto gather together to reminisce about the love, magic and surprises in three wonder-filled stories of Christmas past.
recommendations.director: Alex Mann, Jun Falkenstein, Toby Shelton, Bill Speers, Bradley Raymond

recommendations.title: Mickey, Donald, Goofy: The Three Musketeers
recommendations.overview: In Disney's take on the Alexander Dumas tale, Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck and Goofy want nothing more than to perform brave deeds on behalf of their queen (Minnie Mouse), but they're stymied by the head Musketeer, Pete. Pete secretly wants to get rid o

recommendations.title: Clock Cleaners
recommendations.overview: It's time to laugh like crazy as Mickey, Goofy and Donald fight against raging gears, twisted springs, deafening bells and a sleeping stork. Watch them reach new heights of humor as their valiant efforts to clean a bell tower turn into a real circus!

recommendations.title: Get a Horse!
recommendations.overview: Mickey, Minnie, Horace Horsecollar, and Clarabelle Cow go on a musical wagon ride until Peg-Leg Pete tries to run them off the road.

recommendations.title: Plane Crazy
recommendations.overview: Referred as the actual first Mickey Mouse short. Inspired by Lindbergh's flight from New York to Paris, Mickey builds a plane to take Minnie for a trip.

recommendations.title: Steamboat Willie
recommendations.overview: Mickey Mouse, piloting a steamboat, delights his passenger, Minnie Mouse, by making musical instruments out of the menagerie on deck.
